title: Item view step Duration is incorrect when a step goes through retries or fix cycles

steps.description: Backend: change dashboard/routers/items.py _get_steps + _get_metrics to compute step duration from MIN(started_at) across step_runs ∪ fix_cycles through MAX(completed_at), bulk-queried with GROUP BY step_id. Preserve in-progress live-tick and synthetic setup/merge rows unchanged.

Code review: S01 (correctness of MIN/MAX aggregation across step_runs ∪ fix_cycles, no N+1, nullability, in-progress live-tick preserved, synthetic row handling untouched, no unintended changes to WorkflowStep.started_at semantics elsewhere)

Tests: reproduction integration test (multi-run + fix-cycle timeline → semantic duration check against specific expected seconds) + regression tests for happy path (single run) + total_duration_secs + unit test for aggregation helper. Query-count assertion to prevent future N+1.
Code review: S03 (tests FAIL on pre-fix code, semantic assertions with exact expected seconds not shape-only, testcontainer compliance, no live-DB, fixture reuse per tests/CLAUDE.md)

Final cross-agent review: AC1–AC5 coverage, no regressions to synthetic setup/merge rows, in-progress behaviour preserved, CLAUDE.md compliance, no unintended changes outside dashboard/routers/items.py and tests

QV: Browser verification — on the isolated E2E stack, verify that a synthetic item with multi-run step_runs + fix_cycles shows aggregated Duration + Total Time; verify happy-path item (no retries) is unchanged. Requires an e2e_fixtures seed file.
